history.subject: Slight issue with yesterday’s figures
history.summary: Martin has flagged a discrepancy in the numbers from yesterday's briefing and requests a review of the projections. He also asks for an update of the leadership deck to reflect the latest Q2 assumptions. Additionally, he wants the CRM records revised and the team to be notified on Slack.
tasks: Review the projections from yesterday's briefing
Update the leadership deck to reflect the latest Q2 assumptions
Notify the team on Slack about the revisions

history.subject: Client Sync Meeting Notes
history.summary: The client expressed frustration about a recent delay. Anna will complete the Q2 report by next Wednesday. A stakeholder sync meeting needs to be scheduled for early June, which Johan will handle. HR needs to be informed about a new intern starting on June 5th.
tasks: Schedule a stakeholder sync meeting for early June
Inform HR about a new intern starting on June 5th
